{{Quote|An Imperial base these past seven years and HQ for the 407th Stormtrooper Division. And now my new home as well.|[[Anson Trask]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 4">[[Legacy (2006) 4|''Legacy'' (2006) 4]]</ref>}}
An '''Imperial base''' belonging to [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]]. During the [[Second Imperial Civil War]], it was the headquarters of many [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]] units, including the [[407th Stormtrooper Division]].

The based consisted of several low, domed structures on the surface of the planet. The HQ was established in [[130 ABY]] and served as the division's headquarters for more than seven years. Upon joining [[Joker Squad]], [[Anson Trask]] was sent by [[Nune-class Imperial shuttle|shuttle]] to the Yinchorr headquarters, shortly before the squad moved out to participate in the [[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|Battle]] of [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]].
